---
title: "O Pêndulo Interrompido"
lang: pt-BR
lightbox:
  match: auto
  effect: fade
 
format:
  html:
    other-links:
      - text: Guia Ensino Médio
        href: guia1.html
      - text: Guia USP
        href: guia2.html
        icon: file
    toc: true
    author: Lavínia e Ewout
    subtitle: Uma Atividade Científica Escolar

---

## Apresentação

{{< lipsum 1 >}}

::: {.layout-ncols=2}
{{< placeholder 300 >}}
{{< placeholder 300 >}}

:::
## Material e gravações

### Vídeos

## Imagens

### Conjunto 1


![Img1](imagens/take11_0001.jpg){group="conjunto1" width=20% .lightbox}
![Img2](imagens/take11_0002.jpg){group="conjunto1" width=20% .lightbox}
![Img3](imagens/take11_0003.jpg){group="conjunto1" width=20% .lightbox}
![Img4](imagens/take11_0004.jpg){group="conjunto1" width=20% .lightbox}
![Img5](imagens/take11_0005.jpg){group="conjunto1" width=20% .lightbox}
![Img6](imagens/take11_0006.jpg){group="conjunto1" width=20% .lightbox}
![Img7](imagens/take11_0007.jpg){group="conjunto1" width=20% .lightbox}
![Img8](imagens/take11_0008.jpg){group="conjunto1" width=20% .lightbox}
![Img9](imagens/take11_0009.jpg){group="conjunto1" width=20% .lightbox}
![Img10](imagens/take11_0010.jpg){group="conjunto1" width=20% .lightbox}
![Img11](imagens/take11_0011.jpg){group="conjunto1" width=20% .lightbox}
![Img12](imagens/take11_0012.jpg){group="conjunto1" width=20% .lightbox}
 

### Conjunto 2

![Img13](imagens/take11_0013.jpg){group="conjunto2" width=20% .lightbox}
![Img14](imagens/take11_0014.jpg){group="conjunto2" width=20% .lightbox}
![Img15](imagens/take11_0015.jpg){group="conjunto2" width=20% .lightbox}
![Img16](imagens/take11_0016.jpg){group="conjunto2" width=20% .lightbox}
![Img17](imagens/take11_0017.jpg){group="conjunto2" width=20% .lightbox}
![Img18](imagens/take11_0018.jpg){group="conjunto2" width=20% .lightbox}
![Img19](imagens/take11_0019.jpg){group="conjunto2" width=20% .lightbox}
![Img20](imagens/take11_0020.jpg){group="conjunto2" width=20% .lightbox}
![Img21](imagens/take11_0021.jpg){group="conjunto2" width=20% .lightbox}
![Img22](imagens/take11_0022.jpg){group="conjunto2" width=20% .lightbox}
![Img23](imagens/take11_0023.jpg){group="conjunto2" width=20% .lightbox}
![Img24](imagens/take11_0024.jpg){group="conjunto2" width=20% .lightbox}
